_comment: Single source of truth mapping raw CAD improvement/feature labels -> TapOwner canonical tags. Both the loaders (Python, at re-tag time) and the app (TS) read THIS file. Matching: lowercase the raw label, regex-search each `match` pattern (case-insensitive); the tag applies if any `match` hits AND no `exclude` hits. A property's improvement_tags = the union of tags across all its raw improvement labels. When the data session logs a new/unmapped label in data/improvement_labels_seen.md, add a pattern here (app session owns this file). See IMPROVEMENT_TAXONOMY.md for the full spec.

spa.label: Spa / hot tub
spa.definition: In-ground spa or hot tub (portable units usually not recorded).

casita.label: Guest house / casita
casita.definition: A second detached dwelling, guest quarters, in-law suite, or ADU.

shed_workshop.label: Shed / workshop
shed_workshop.definition: Detached shed, workshop, shop, or utility outbuilding.

boat_dock.label: Boat dock
boat_dock.definition: Private boat dock, boathouse, boat slip, or boat lift (also implies waterfront).

rv.label: RV parking
rv.definition: RV pad, cover, port, or hookup.

garage.label: Garage
garage.definition: Enclosed garage (attached or detached). Space count comes from the improvement units/count where available. NOT surfaced as a filter chip (Frederick 2026-07-15: attached garages are near-universal, so 'any garage' filters nothing) — the card's Garage row reads the has_garage column instead.

garage_detached.label: Detached garage
garage_detached.definition: Stand-alone garage building (not attached to the dwelling). The discriminating garage filter — attached garages are near-universal. Bexar codes: GAR/DG = detached (ground-truthed on 2803 Stokely Hl), AG = attached (excluded). Official BCAD legend confirmation pending from the data session.

basement.label: Basement
basement.definition: Below-grade finished or unfinished space (rare in TX).

sport_court.label: Tennis / sport court
sport_court.definition: Private tennis, pickleball, basketball, or other sport/recreation court.

waterfront.label: Waterfront
waterfront.definition: Parcel abuts water. Best derived from parcel geometry or a land 'waterfront' influence code; a boat_dock also implies it.

corner_lot.label: Corner lot
corner_lot.definition: Parcel on a corner. Best derived from parcel geometry or a land 'corner' influence code.

single_story.label: Single-story
single_story.definition: One-story dwelling. DERIVED from the parcels.stories field (== 1), NOT an improvement label.
